content-right-description1:
Overview

A block used for multiblocks item input currently including:
content-right-description2:
Usage

In any multiblock this block will act as the input slot for items.

When placed next to an asteroid missions launch station in combination with an item output block, it will cyle the invalid chip to an new one out of the input block and put the old one into the output block.
content-right-description3:
Block Info

arlib:block_item_input_block
Hardness: 0.5
Blast Resistance: 2.0
Require Tool: NO
Sealable: YES
Multiblock: NO
